flashcards.definition: The angle above the horizontal line of sight, found with arctan(height/distance).
The angle below the horizontal line of sight to an object below the observer.
θ = arccos(u·v / (|u||v|)) gives the angle between two vectors.
n₁ sin θ₁ = n₂ sin θ₂; solve for θ₂ using arcsin.
θ = arctan(v_y / v_x) for a projectile's initial velocity components.
